name: expand-morph
title: expandMorph
description: A rounded card starts at a small origin rect — a region of the outgoing scene — and smoothly expands (position, size and corner radius interpolated together) to fill the screen, revealing the incoming scene as it grows. Onda's calm take on a morphing modal / image-expand-to-fullscreen reveal, with no overshoot. Onda-original.
pickWhen: the incoming scene is conceptually "inside" the outgoing — tap-card-to-open, photo-to-fullscreen, modal. Use `morph` for in-place.
